---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the Graviton Engine
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I want to run a model but KV Cache eats all my memory during 4000 sequence generation.

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g., Add RoPE integration or KV-Cache INT8 compression).

## Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. If this relates to a new paper (e.g., BitNet b1.58), link the paper!
